flattened_note: The 2025 WV IT-140 form bundle (56 pages, instructions + forms) is fully flattened — zero AcroForm fields, zero widget annotations. The 2024 version (it140.2024.pdf) was fillable (564 fields), but WV switched to a non-fillable format for 2025. WV pushes taxpayers to its MyTaxes portal (https://mytaxes.wvtax.gov/) for electronic filing. Verified 2026-04-12.
